sources: Pokemon Showdown (base stats, abilities, types — already updated for Champions)

verification.description: All data has been cross-referenced against Serebii's Champions pages. The championsVerified flag is true for all entries. Moves include an inChampions field — 494 moves are available in Champions, 406 are not.
